component.name: bava
component.summary: Music visualizer driven by cavacore and MPRIS

description.p: bava is a Linux music visualizer built on the Bevy engine. It captures the default audio output's monitor through PulseAudio (and PipeWire via pipewire-pulse), runs it through cavacore — the analysis engine from CAVA — and renders smoothed, log-spaced frequency bars with HDR bloom.
It also reads now-playing metadata over MPRIS, showing the current track's title, artist, and album, and fetching album art into a dimmed backdrop when the player exposes it.

ul.li: Real-time spectrum analysis with configurable bars, smoothing, and frequency range
Eleven Cavalier-style drawing modes (bars, wave, particles, circles, and more)
Now-playing track info and album art over MPRIS
In-app settings editor with live-reflected changes and named profiles

screenshot.caption: Frequency bars reacting to playing audio

description.p: Initial Flatpak release: bars/monstercat visualizer, MPRIS now-playing with album art, and the in-app settings editor.
